title: OpenAI Codex CLI Added Web Search, Schema, And Plugin Marketplace Updates
summary: OpenAI's Codex CLI 0.139 changelog records standalone web search support in code mode, richer tool/connector schema preservation, expanded local diagnostics, plugin marketplace JSON/source metadata, and fixes for resume/fork prompts, MCP startup warnings, image edits, and URL handling.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Retest Codex CLI code-mode runs that depend on web search, nested tool calls, MCP schemas, plugin marketplace automation, image edits, or resume/fork prompt handling.
Review local diagnostic collection expectations because Codex CLI reports more environment context while redacting raw JSON values.

detail.change_summary: Codex CLI 0.139 changed agent workflow behavior around code-mode web search, MCP/tool schema compatibility, diagnostics, plugin marketplace metadata, and several CLI reliability paths.

limitations: The plugin catalog cache mentioned in the changelog is software-cache behavior; APW does not classify it as prompt caching or token accounting.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
